instructions.discharge_instructions: Take ciprofloxacin with food and water. Complete the full course. Ibuprofen for pain as needed, not to exceed 1200 mg/day. Avoid if stomach upset.
instructions.follow_up: Follow up with your primary care doctor in 3-5 days.
instructions.return_precautions: fever worsens, unable to keep fluids down, or symptoms not improving in 48 hours.
